title: RSA 1:3. Return.
text:
A return of each perambulation shall be made describing the marks and monuments of such line and particularly describing any change of location or resetting of any monument as authorized in this chapter, and such return shall be signed by the duly authorized representative of both states and a copy filed with the secretary of state.

Source: Source. 2000, 35:1, eff. Jan. 1, 2001.
title_name: TITLE I THE STATE AND ITS GOVERNMENT
